title: UZABAKIRIHO HAKIZIMANA  v. UBUSHINJACYAHA
text:
UZABAKIRIHO HAKIZIMANA v. UBUSHINJACYAHA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE – RPAA 01291/2024/CA (Kanyange, P.J.,) 28
Ugushyingo 2025]
Amategeko agenga ibimenyetso – Icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana – Ibimenyetso – Mu manza
nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora gushingirwaho mu gihe bigaragaza ukuri
kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en matière pénale) ababuranyi bakaba barahawe
uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Uzabakiriho Hakizimana akurikiranweho icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana
w’umukobwa w’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17) wahawe izina rya N.D muri uru rubanza, nyuma
y’ikirego se yatanze mu Bugenzacyaha, Uzabakiriho yatangiye gukurikiranwa.
Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Uzabakiriho Hakizimana mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye
rwa Gasabo icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, bushingiye ku mvugo z’uwo mwana no kuri raporo
ya muganga, maze bumusabira igifungo cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu (25).Uzabakiriho
Hakizimana yaburanye ahakana icyaha.
Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo rwaciye urubanza rusanga hari ibimenyetso bimuhamya icyaha
akurikiranweho, raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko yasambanyijwe, imvugo z’uwo mwana, bityo
rwemeje ko ahamwa n’icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, maze rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka
20.
Uzabakiriho Hakizimana yajuriye mu Rukiko Rukuru avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha atakoze, kuko
kuba raporo ya muganga basanze umwana yaratakaje akarangabusugi bitavuze ko ari we
wakavanyeho, avuga kandi ko hatabajijwe abatangabuhamya be bazi iby’amakimbirane yari
afitanye na se w’uwo mwana.
Ubushinjacyaha bwasubije ko izo mpamvu z’ubujurire nta shingiro zifite, kuko bwatanze
ibimenyetso bihagije atabashije kuvuguruza.
Urukiko rwaciye urubanza, rusanga n’ubwo Uzabakiriho Hakizimana ahakaba icyaha, hari
ibimenyetso atabashije kuvuguruza bigaragaza ko yagikoze, bigizwe na raporo ya muganga
igaragaza ko akarangabusugi k’umwana kangiritse kandi ko amenyereye imibonano mpuzabitsina
(hymen avec multiples déchirures, elle est sexuellement active), bityo ko nta gihindutse ku
gifungo cy’imyaka 20 yahanishijwe.
Uzabakiriho Hakizimana Hakizimana yatanze ubujurire bwa kabiri mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire, we
n’umwunganira bavuga ko Urukiko rwamuhamije icyaha rushingiye ku bimenyetso birimo urujijo,
kwivuguruza, kugenekereza no gushidikanya, bigizwe n’imvugo za N.D na raporo ya muganga,
ko kandi rutabajije abatangabuhamya be.
Uregwa akomeza avuga ko ibyagaragajwe na raporo ya muganga bitamushinja, kuko muganga
yasobanuye ko ibyo yabonye bimeze neza usibye akarangabusugi karimo utwenge, bityo ko ibyo
atari ikimenyetso cy’uko yasambanyijwe.

Uregwa yireguye avuga kandi ko Urukiko rutabajije abatangabuhamya bazi iby’amakimbirane
yari afitanye na se wa N.D, barimo uwitwa Ntaganda.
Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu z’ubujurire nta shingiro zifite, kuko kuba
raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko akarangabusugi ka N.D kacikaguritse ari ingaruka z’uko
yasambanyijwe igihe kirekire, no kuba yaragaragaje ko yari amenyereye imibonano mpuzabitsina
bihura n’uko mwana yavuze ko yari amaze kumusambanya inshuro eshatu.
Ikibazo kigomba gusuzumwa muri uru rubanza ni ukumenya niba hari inenge ziri mu bimenyetso
byashingiweho Uzabakiriho Hakizimana ahamwa n’icyaha no kumenya niba Urukiko rutarabajije
abatangabuhamya be.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Mu manza nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora gushingirwaho mu
gihe bigaragaza ukuri kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en matière pénale)
ababuranyi bakaba barahawe uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko N° 15/2004 ryo ku wa 12/06/2004 ryerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza n’itangwa ryabyo,
ingingo ya 119.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Urubanza RPAA 00692/2021/CA rw’Ubushinjacyaha na Ndayishimiye, rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 20/01/2023;
Urubanza RPAA 00245/2025/CA, rw’Ubushinjacyaha na Habyarimana Djuma, rwaciwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 24/10/2025.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Uzabakiriho Hakizimana akurikiranweho icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana w’umukobwa
w’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17) wahawe izina rya N.D11 muri uru rubanza, wasobanuye ko ku wa
03/12/2019 yamuhamagaye ngo aze amubwire agira ngo arashaka kumutuma, ahageze
aramugaburira, arangije amujyama mu cyumba amusambanyiriza ku bikarito yararagaho, ko kandi
na mbere yajyagayo akamusambanya amaze kumuha ibiryo, akamubuza kubibwira nyina ngo
atazamurega, ko ariko yaje kubimenya abibwiwe n’abana bamubonye avayo. Nyuma y’ikirego se
yatanze mu Bugenzacyaha Uzabakiriho yatangiye gukurikiranwa.
1 Yahawe iri zina kuko ari umwana

[2] Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Uzabakiriho Hakizimana mu Rukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Gasabo icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, bushingiye ku kuba yemera ko N.D
yaje iwe ku wa 03/12/2019 bagasangira, ku mvugo z’uwo mwana uvuga ko basangiye yarangiza
akamusambanya no kuri raporo ya muganga, bumusabira igifungo cy’imyaka makumyabiri
n’itanu (25).
[3] Uzabakiriho Hakizimana yaburanye ahakana icyaha, avuga ko N.D yaje iwe ari kumwe
n’abandi bana barasangira, amaze kurya arataha, ko iwabo aribo batumye amubeshyera kubera
ikibazo bafitanye.
[4] Urukiko rwaciye urubanza RP 00006/2021/TGI/GSBO ku wa 31/12/2020, rusanga hari
ibimenyetso bimuhamya icyaha akurikiranweho birimo ibyo yemeye mu nzego z’iperereza ko
N.D. yageze iwe akamuha ibiryo, raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko yasambanyijwe, imvugo z’uwo
mwana wasobanuye ko yari inshuro ya 3 amusambanya kandi ko yabanzaga kumuha ibiryo, uwo
mwana asobanura ko uburiri bwe bugizwe n’ibikarito nawe akaba yemera ko aribyo asasa, bivuze
ko azi neza uburiri aryamaho kandi yamuryamishijeho; ko ibyo avuga ko iwabo b’uwo mwana ari
bo batumye amubeshyera kubera ibibazo bafitanye nta shingiro bifite, kuko ibyo avuga ko apfa na
se w’uwo mwana bitandukanye n’ibyo yavugiye mu Bugenzacyaha, akaba ari ikimenyetso cy’uko
ibyo avuga nta kuri kurimo. Rwemeje rero ko ahamwa n’icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana,
rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 20.
[5] Uzabakiriho Hakizimana yajuriye mu Rukiko Rukuru avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha
atakoze, kuko kuba raporo ya muganga yarasanze umwana yaratakaje akarangabusugi bitavuze ko
ari we wakavanyeho, ko hatabajijwe abatangabuhamya be bazi iby’amakimbirane yari afitanye na
se w’uwo mwana, ko no kuba yaremeye ko uwo mwana yaje iwe akamugaburira atari impamvu
ihagije yemeza ko yamusambanyije kuko hari abandi bana bazaga iwe akabaha ibiryo.
[6] Ubushinjacyaha bwasubije ko izo mpamvu z’ubujurire nta shingiro zifite, kuko bwatanze
ibimenyetso bihagije atabashije kuvuguruza.
[7] Urukiko rwaciye urubanza RPA 00165/2021/HC/KIG ku wa 12/11/2024, rusanga n’ubwo
Uzabakiriho Hakizimana ahakaba icyaha, hari ibimenyetso atabashije kuvuguruza bigaragaza ko
yagikoze, bigizwe na raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko akarangabusugi k’umwana kangiritse kandi
ko amenyeye imibonano mpuzabitsina (hymen avec multiples déchirures, elle est sexuellement
active), bigahura n’uko uwo mwana yavuze ko yari yaramugize umugore, no kuba Uzabakiriho
Hakizimana yemera ko uwo mwana yaje iwe akamugaburira, kandi bombi bagahuriza ku kuba
aryama hasi ku bikarito. Rwemeje rero ko nta gihindutse ku gifungo cy’imyaka 20 yahanishijwe.
[8] Uzabakiriho Hakizimana Hakizimana yatanze ubujurire bwa kabiri mu Rukiko
rw’Ubujurire, urubanza rwandikwa kuri RPAA 01291/2024/CA, iburanisha ribera mu ruhame ku
wa 19/11/2025 yunganiwe na Me Munyansanga Gisèle, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na
SIBOMANA Stanislas, Umushinjacyaha ku rwego rw’Igihugu.
[9] Mu myanzuro y’ubujurire no mu miburanire, Uzabakiriho Hakizimana n’umwunganira
bavuga ko Urukiko rwamuhamije icyaha rushingiye ku bimenyetso birimo urujijo, kwivuguruza,
kugenekereza no gushidikanya, bigizwe n’imvugo za N.D na raporo ya muganga, ko kandi
rutabajije abatangabuhamya be.

[10] Uhagararariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga impamvu z’ubujurire bwa Uzabakiriho Hakizimana
nta shingiro zifite, kuko ibyo raporo ya muganga yagaragaje ari ingaruka z’uko yasambanyijwe
kandi ikaba ihura n’imvugo z’umwana wasambanyijwe.
[11] Ikibazo kigomba gusuzumwa muri uru rubanza ni ukumenya niba hari inenge ziri mu
bimenyetso byashingiweho Uzabakiriho Hakizimana ahamwa n’icyaha no kumenya niba Urukiko
rutarabajije abatangabuhamya be.
II. ISESENGURA RY’IKIBAZO KIRI MU RUBANZA
Kumenya niba hari inenge ziri mu bimenyetso byashingiweho Uzabakiriho Hakizimana
ahamwa n’icyaha no kumenya niba Urukiko rutarabajije abatangabuhamya be
[12] Uzabakiriho Hakizimana n’umwunganira bavuga ko yahamijwe icyaha hashingiwe ku
bimenyetso bifite inenge bigizwe na raporo ya muganga n’imvugo za N.D.
[13] Ku birebana na raporo ya muganga, bavuga ko ivuga ko icyaha cyakozwe ku wa
04/12/2019 mu gihe icyaha aregwa bavuga ko cyakozwe ku wa 03/12/2019, ko rero iyo raporo
itagomba gushingirwaho kuko inyuranye n’iyo yagombye kuba aregeshwa, ko ahubwo N.D
ashakisha itariki icyaha cyakorewe kuko atayizi, kuko hatamenywa niba ari ku wa 03/12/2029
cyangwa ku wa 04/12/2029, bityo ko hashingirwa ku ngingo ya 111 y’Itegeko ryerekeye
imiburanishirize y’imanza z’inshinjabyaha ivuga ko gushidikanya birengera uregwa.
[14] Bavuga kandi ko ibyagaragajwe na raporo ya muganga bitamushinja, ko ahubwo ari
imiterere y’imyanya ndangagitsina ya N.D, kuko muganga yasobanuye ko ibyo yabonye bimeze
neza usibye ko akarangabusugi karimo utwenge, ibyo ariko akaba atari ikimenyetso cy’uko
yasambanyijwe kuko atavuze ko kavuyeho ahubwo yavuze ko gahari ariko gafite utwenge twinshi,
ko kandi umwana wo mu kigero cya N.D atari gusambanywa n’umugabo nka Uzabakiriho
Hakizimana ngo akarangabusugi ntikaveho. Byongeye kandi mu mwanzuro wa raporo, muganga
yavuze ko uwo mwana yari asanzwe akora imibonano mpuzabitsina, bivuze ko yasanze ari
muzima akaba ashobora gukora icyo gikorwa, ko rero atari ikimenyetso cy’uko yasambanyijwe na
Uzabakiriho Hakizimana kuko nta mazina ye ariho cyangwa amasohoro ye, cyangwa ikindi
kimenyetso afitanye isano nacyo. Basanga ahubwo Urukiko rwarahaye iyo raporo isobanuro
bigoretse kuko amagambo ‘’hymen avec multiples déchirures, elle est sexuellement active’’,
asobanuye ko umwana afite akarangabusugi karimo utwenge ko kandi ameze neza ku buryo yakora
imibonano mpuzabitsina.
[15] Ku birebana n’imvugo za N.D, bavuga ko yasobanuye ko yasambanyijwe inshuro eshatu,
nyamara mu gika cya 5 cy’urubanza rujuririrwa havugwa ko urubanza rushingiye ku gikorwa cyo
ku wa 03/12/2019, kandi ko kuba avuga inshuro eshatu ariko ntavuge amataliki, hari urujijo no
gushidikanya mubyo avuga, hakaba hanakwibazwa uburyo umwana w’imyaka 17 yari
gusambanywa inshuro eshatu ntagire uwo abibwira cyangwa ngo atake.
[16] Na none kandi ngo kuba N.D yaravuze ko Uzabakiriho Hakizimana aryama ku bikarito uyu
nawe akabyemeza, atari ikimenyetso kimushinja, kuko uwo mwana yazaga kwa Uzabakiriho
Hakizimana ari kumwe n’abandi bana akabona ubwo buriri, bikaba rero bitari guhuzwa no
kumusambanya, ndetse kuba se avuga ko afite ikibazo cyo mu mutwe, bikaba bigoye kwemeza ko

ari Uzabakiriho Hakizimana wamusambanyije ahubwo ibyo yavuze yabibwiwe na se kubera
amakimbirane bari bafitanye. Bavuga kandi ko Urukiko rutabajije abatangabuhamya bazi
iby’amakimbirane yari afitanye na se wa N.D, barimo uwitwa Ntaganda.
[17] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga ko izo mpamvu z’ubujurire nta shingiro zifite, kuko
kuba raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko akarangabusugi ka N.D kacikaguritse ari ingaruka z’uko
yasambanyijwe igihe kirekire, no kuba yaragaragaje ko yari amenyereye imibonano mpuzabitsina
bihura n’uko mwana yavuze ko yari amaze kumusambanya inshuro eshatu. Avuga kandi ko
ibivugwa na Uzabakiriho Hakizimana ko iyo raporo itavuga ko ari we wamusambanyije nta
shingiro bifite, kuko ashinjwa n’uwo mwana kandi nawe akaba yemera ko yageze iwe akamuha
ibiryo, bombi bagahuriza ku miterere y’uburiri bwe, ko kandi nta bundi buryo uwo mwana yari
kumenya imiterere y’ubwo buriri.
[18] Uhagarariye Ubushinjacyaha avuga kandi ko nta nenge ziri mu mvugo za N.D, kuko kuba
atarahise avuga ibyamukorewe byatewe n’uko yari akiri muto, kuko no kugira ngo bimenyekane
byaturutse ku bandi bana babonye Uzabakiriho Hakizimana yikingiranye n’uwo mwana
bakabibwira se, nawe akaba adahakana ko uwo mwana yahageze akamuha ibiryo, ko kandi nta
bundi buryo yari kumenye imiterere y’uburiri bwe uretse kuba yarabumuryamishijeho. Asanga
kandi kuba se w’umwana yaravuze ko afite ikibazo cyo mu mutwe, byaba ahubwo impamvu yo
kumufatirana no kuba ataravuze ibyamubayeho, cyane cyane ko atari we wabivuze bwa mbere
ahubwo yabajijwe icyo yakoranaga kwa Uzabakiriho Hakizimana bikingiranye.
[19] Avuga kandi ko iby’amakimbirane Uzabakiriho Hakizimana avuga ko yari afitanye na se
wa N.D ashingiye ku kuba yaravugaga ko amusambanyiriza umugore nta gaciro byahabwa, kuko
batari kuba bafitanye amakimbirane ngo umwana we ajye aza iwe anamuhe ibiryo.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[20] Impaka muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba hari inenge ziri mu bimenyetso
byashingiweho n’Urukiko Uzabakiriho Hakizimana ahamwa n’icyaha no kuba hatarabajijwe
abatangabuhamya bo guhamya amakimbiane yari afitanye na se wa N.D.
[21] Ku byerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza, mu rubanza RPAA 00692/2021/CA rwaciwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 20/01/2023, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Ndayishimiye Jean
Damascène, hasesenguwe ingingo ya 119 y’Itegeko N° 15/2004 ryo ku wa 12/06/2004 ryerekeye
ibimenyetso mu manza n’itangwa ryabyo2, harebwe cyane cyane ku mwihariko w’imanza
nshinjabyaha, maze Urukiko rusobanura ko mu manza nshinjabyaha, ibimenyetso byose bishobora
gushingirwaho mu gihe bigaragaza ukuri kw’ibyabaye (principe de la liberté de la preuve en
matière pénale) ababuranyi bakaba barahawe uburyo bwo kuhaba ngo banyomozanye. Ibi
byanashingiweho mu zindi manza, urwa nyuma akaba ari urubanza RPAA 00245/2025/CA
rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 24/10/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Habyarimana
Djuma.
2 Iyo ngingo ihura n’ingingo ya 87 y’Itegeko Nº 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso.

[22] Kugira ngo Uzabakiriho Hakizimana ahamwe n’icyaha cyo gusambanya umwana, inkiko
zabanje zabishingiye kuri raporo ya muganga igaragaza ko akarangabusugi k’umwana kangiritse
kandi ko amenyereye imibonano mpuzabitsina (hymen avec multiples déchirures, elle est
sexuellement active), no ku mvugo za N.D zumvikanisha ko yari yaramugize umugore, no kuba
Uzabakiriho Hakizimana yemera ko uwo mwana yaje iwe akamugaburira, kandi bombi bagahuriza
ku kuba aryama ku buriri bw’ibikarito.
[23] Muri dosiye y’uru rubanza, harimo raporo ya muganga igaragaza ibimenyetso muganga
yabonye kuri N.D. nyuma yo kumusuzuma, harimo kuba akarangabusugi gacikaguritse (multiples
déchirures) no kuba yari amenyereye imibonano mpuzabitsina (elle est sexuellement active).
Harimo kandi inyandikomvugo ya N.D. wasobanuye ko ku wa 03/12/2029 Uzabakiriho
Hakizimana yamuhamagaye agira ngo agiye kumutuma, ahageze amuha ibiryo amaze kurya
amujyana mu cyumba, akuramo ikabutura nawe amubwira ngo akuremo imyenda, aryama ku
bikarito kuko aribyo aryamaho aramusambanya, ko hari n’indi minsi yajyagayo akamuha abiryo
bakaryamana, akamubuza kubibwira nyina ngo atazamurega, ko yabibwiwe n’abana bamubonye
ava kwa Uzabakiriho Hakizimana.
[24] Ku bivugwa na Uzabakiriho Hakizimana numwunganira ko raporo ya muganga
itamushinja ngo kuko ibyo yagaragaje ari imiterere y’igitsina cya N.D, Urukiko rurasanga nta
shingiro bifite, kuko kugira ngo iyo raporo ikorwe, byashingiye ku makuru y’uko N.D yagiye kwa
Uzabakiriho Hakizimana bakikingirana, iwabo bamubaza akababwira ko yagiye iwe koko
akamuha ibiryo nyuma akamusambanya ko kandi itari inshuro ya mbere amusambanya, muganga
amusuzumye asanga akarangabusugi ke karacikaguritse (multiples déchirures) ko kandi
amenyereye imibonano mpuzabitsina; ibyagaragajwe n’iyo raporo rero bikaba bihura n’imvugo
z’uwo mwana wavuze ko yari amaze kumusambanya inshuro eshatu.
[25] Naho ibyo Uzabakiriho Hakizimana n’umwunganira bavuga ko raporo itagaragaje ko ari
we wamusambanyije cyangwa ngo igaragaze ko hari amasohoro ye yamubonetseho, Urukiko
rurasanga nta shingoro bifite, kuko icyo muganga yasabwe ari ukugaragaza niba hari ibimenyetso
bigaragaza ko N.D yasambanyijwe, kuvuga uwamusambanyije bikaba rero bitari mu nshingano
ze. Ndetse no kuba nta masohoro yagaragaye kuri uwo mwana bikaba bitavuze ko atasambanyijwe,
cyane cyane ko no kuba yarasuzumwe haciyemo umunsi, hari ibimenyetso bitari kuba bikimuriho.
[26] Urukiko rurasanga kandi, kuba muganga yaranditse ko icyaha cyakozwe ku wa 04/12/2019
saa kumi n’imwe (17h), bigaragara ko ari ikosa ry’imyandikire, kuko harebwe izindi nyandiko za
dosiye harimo n’inyandiko yo kwiyambaza impuguke havugwa ko icyaha cyakozwe ku wa
03/12/2019 kuko n’umwana yavuze ko byabaye ku wa 03/12/2019 saa kumi n’imwe, iyo tariki
n’iyo saba biba ari nabyo se yavuze mu nyandikomvugo ye, ndetse na Uzabakiriho Hakizimana
mu nyandikomvugo yo mu Bugenzacyaha akaba yaremeye ko uwo munsi no kuri iyo saba N.D
yaje iwe.
[27] Kubyo Uzabakiriho Hakizimana n’umwunganira banenga imvugo za N.D ngo kuko yavuze
ko yasambanyijwe inshuro eshatu ariko ntiyavuga amatariki ndetse ntiyagira uwo abibwira,
Urukiko rurasanga nta shingiro bifite, kuko harebwe uko icyaha cyamenyekanye, bitaraturutse kuri
uwo mwana kuko yavuze ko Uzabakiriho Hakizimana yari yaramubujije kubivuga, bivuze rero ko
atashoboraga kwibuka amatariki y’ibyabaye mbere yo ku wa 03/12/2019, kuko no kugira ngo
ibyabaye kuri iyo tariki bimenyekane byatewe n’abandi bana babibwiye iwabo wa N.D. Urukiko

rurasanga kandi no kuba ataragize uwo abibwira byatewe n’uko yavuze ko Uzabakiriho
Hakizimana yari yaramubujije, cyane cyane ko yamushukishaga ibiryo, yamara kubirya akabona
kumusambanya nk’uko uwo mwana yabisobanuye, na Uzabakiriho Hakizimana kandi mu
nyandikomvugo ye mu Bugenzacyaha akaba yaremeye ko uwo munsi uwo mwana yaje iwe
akamuha ibiryo, akaba ataranavuze ko hari abandi bana bari baharí nk’uko ashaka kumvikanisha
ko yagaburiraga n’abandi bana.
[28] Na none kandi, ibivugwa na Uzabakiriho Hakizimana n’umwunganira ko kuba we na N.D.
bahuriza ku bigize uburiri bwe atari ikimenyetso kimushinja ngo kuko uwo mwana yari asanzwe
ahaza ari kumwe n’abandi bana, Urukiko rusanga nta shingiro byahabwa, kuko adasobanura
uburyo uwo mwana yari kumenya ibyo aryamaho kuba kandi yarahazaga bikaba bitavuze ko
yagombaga no kumenya uko uburiri bwe buteye kuko ubundi icyumba cy’umuntu kitavogerwa
n’uwo ariwe wese, bityo nk’uko byasobanuwe mu manza za mbere, uru Rukiko narwo rurasanga
nta bundi buryo uwo mwana yari kumenya imiterere y’ubwo buriri bitari ukuba yarabujyanyweho
na Uzabakiriho Hakizimana amusambanya.
[29] Naho ku birebana n’amakimbirane Uzabakiriho Hakizimana avuga ko yari afitanye na se
wa N.D akaba yaratumye atamika uwo mwana ibyo avuga, Urukiko rurasanga nta shingiro bifite,
kuko atari kuba afitanye amakimbirane na se w’uwo mwana ngo ajye amwakira iwe
anamugaburire ndetse anisanzure kugeza ubwo amenya uko uburiri bwe buteye, bivuze rero ko
iby’ayo makimbirane ari urwitwazo kugira ngo ahunge icyaha. Byongeye kandi kuba iby’ayo
makimbirane ari urwitwazo bishimangirwa n’uko mu Bugenzacyaha yavuze ko ashingiye ku kuba
se wa N.D yaravugaga ko amusambanyiriza umugore, mu gihe mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye yavuze
ko ashingiye ku kuba hari ahantu bajyaga gusaba amafaranga akishyura wenyine, se w’uwo
mwana akanga kwishyura ahubwo akamubwira ngo aho azamushyira azahabona, bikaba rero
bishimangira ko ayo makimbirane ayitwaza ashaka guhunga icyaha, ndetse n’abatangabuhamya
avuga bakaba batari kuvuga ibintu nawe avuga mu buryo butandukanye.
[30] Hashingiwe ku byasobanuwe, Urukiko rurasanga nta nenge ziri mu bimenyetso
bwashingiweho nk’uko Uzabakiriho Hakizimana abivuga, ahubwo ibimenyetso byashingiweho
byuzuzanya kandi bikaba bimuhamya icyaha nk’uko inkiko za mbere zakimuhamije, bityo hakaba
hakwiye kugumaho igifungo cy’imyaka makumyabiri (20) yahanishijwe n’Urukiko Rukuru kuko
gikwiranye n’icyaha yakoze, harebwe cyane cyane imyaka yari afite (45) n’iy’umwana
yasambanyije (17) yari afite.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’ URUKIKO
[31] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Uzabakiriho Hakizimana nta shingiro bufite;
[32] Rwemeje ko urubanza RPA 00165/2021/HC/KIG rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru ku wa
12/11/2024 rugumanye agaciro mu ngingo zarwo zose;
[33] Rutegetse ko igifungo cy’imyaka makumyabiri (20) Uzabakiriho Hakizimana
yahanishijwe ku cyaha cyo gusambanya umwana kigumyeho.
